sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nisim ka nuntakna Jesuh tawh kinai semsem veng,
Ngun le kham sang siangzaw tang zaw, A hoihna
genzo keng;
Ka lungsim mit kha in Ama hoihna teng ka mu hi,
Nisim hunsim khangto Jesuh itna khum
semsem hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kim khat beek kigenzo kei,
Tua galkhat kham khua thu;
Jesuh hong
itna khumzaw tham lai ding hi, tua mun ah.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A gamla pek pan ka mu hi, A vangliatna hong
tang,
Unok pak sang hoihzaw tham lai, zingsol bangin hong taang;
Ka lunggulhnate hong pia in, kei
hong lungkimsak hi,
Nisim hunsim khangto Jesuh itna khum semsem hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lungkhamna ka
thuakzelzel hang, Amah’n hong suakta sak,
A ang sung hong pom hong dal in, ka lungkhamna
beisak;
Kei tang ding A pumpi’n hong thuakna hang Khris ka it hi,
Nisim hunsim khangto Jesuh
itna khum semsem hi.
